commands.name: GetUpdateNotes
commands.description: Retrieves notes for the specific update and locale.

commands.name: PushUpdate
commands.description: Builds a package and uploads it to the files host

options.name: --sourcedirectory
options.description: Required. Directory of the files to be packed.

options.name: --versionprovider
options.description:
Relative path to the file which should be used to
determine the version of the package and the
version of a client installed on a user's
machine.May not be specified and will be taken
from the package specs in this case.

options.name: --packagespecsfile
options.description: Required. Path to the package specifications file.

options.name: --projectionspecsfile
options.description:
Path to the package projection specifications
file.

options.name: --updatesspecsfile
options.description: Path to the package updates specifications file.

options.name: --updatenotesfiles
options.description:
Files containing package update notes. Supposed
that each file contains a localized version of the
package notes.

options.name: --workingdirectory
options.description: Path to the working directory to build a package.

options.name: --force
options.description:
True if push the package even in case when the
same package is already present on the host. The
package entry in the update manifest will be
updated.

options.name: --forceifemptynotes
options.description:
True if push the package if update notes file is
specified but no update notes have been found for
this version of the package.
